Utterances.Utterance: I just received my order and an item is missing.

ExpectedFlow.Step: Greeting_State (User: I just received my order and an item is missing.)
Ask_Order_Details (Agent: I apologize for the mistake. What was your order number and what item is missing?)
Provide_Details (User: Order number is 2468, and the Caesar salad is missing.)
Verify_Order_State
Offer_Resolution (Agent: I see the Caesar salad on your order. I can either have it sent out to you immediately or credit your account for the item.)
Choose_Resolution (User: Please just credit my account.)
Confirm_Credit (Agent: I have credited the cost of the Caesar salad to your account. Again, apologies for the error.)
Disconnect_State (Agent: Thank you for letting us know. Have a good day.)

Utterances.Utterance: The food I ordered was cold and didn't taste fresh.

ExpectedFlow.Step: Greeting_State (User: The food I ordered was cold and didn't taste fresh.)
Ask_Order_Number (Agent: I'm very sorry to hear that. Can you please provide your order number?)
Provide_Order_Number (User: It is order 1357.)
Log_Complaint_State
Offer_Compensation (Agent: I have logged this feedback for our kitchen. I'd like to offer you a 20% discount on your next order as an apology.)
Accept_Compensation (User: Okay, thank you. I appreciate that.)
Disconnect_State (Agent: Thank you for your feedback. We hope to serve you better next time.)

Utterances.Utterance: My order is over 30 minutes late. This is unacceptable.

ExpectedFlow.Step: Greeting_State (User: My order is over 30 minutes late. This is unacceptable.)
Ask_Order_Number (Agent: I understand your frustration. What is your order number so I can check on it?)
Provide_Order_Number (User: Order number 8642.)
Check_Driver_Status_State
Provide_Update (Agent: I see the driver got stuck in heavy traffic. They are about 5 minutes away now. I apologize for the delay.)
Acknowledge_Update (User: Okay, I'll wait a bit more then.)
Disconnect_State (Agent: Thank you for your patience.)

Utterances.Utterance: I just wanted to say the food was amazing tonight!

ExpectedFlow.Step: Greeting_State (User: I just wanted to say the food was amazing tonight!)
Acknowledge_Feedback (Agent: That is wonderful to hear! Thank you so much for taking the time to share that with us.)
Ask_Review (Agent: Would you mind leaving a review on our website? It really helps us out.)
Agree_Review (User: Sure, I can do that.)
Provide_Link (Agent: Great! You can leave a review at example.com/reviews. Thank you again!)
Disconnect_State (Agent: Have a fantastic evening!)
